data.title: Cryptocurrency Litecoin Up More Than 3% In 24 hours
data.description: Litecoin's (CRYPTO: LTC) price has increased 3.14% over the past 24 hours to $71.08, which is in the opposite direction of its trend over the past week, where it has experienced a 1.0% loss, moving from $71.94 to its current price.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Pepe Up More Than 3% In 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Pepe's (CRYPTO: PEPE) price has risen 3.31% to $0.000010. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 2.0% gain, moving from $0.000010 to its current price.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Render Rises More Than 3% In 24 hours
GE Vernova Gains Investor Confidence With Strong Revenue Outlook And Path To Higher Margins, Say Analysts
data.description: GEV share price rises on strong earnings, with analysts optimistic about future revenue and margins. Morgan Stanley raises PT to $301, RBC raises PT to $285, and Oppenheimer remains cautious.
